description: P5 planned-path policy with restriction_map.npy scanning.

charging_zone_path_policy.semantics: charging zones are already covered by restriction_map.npy; circles in zone_policy.json provide semantic labels and clearer diagnostics
charging_zone_path_policy.note: Robots should be manually moved out to the script initial poses before experiment start.

restriction_map.note: This map is the authoritative source for blocked zones, including charging zones.
